summary: Currently pursuing an M.S. in Artificial Intelligence at Illinois Institute of Technology with deep, applied knowledge of supervised and unsupervised learning, deep learning, and NLP. Conducted rigorous model evaluation across four architectures using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance, built a 55-question domain evaluation set to systematically surface AI reasoning failures, and maintained reproducible ML pipelines with pytest and CI/CD automation. Proficient in Python with Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and XGBoost, and experienced writing precise technical solutions and identifying failure modes like overfitting, data leakage, and class imbalance in production ML systems.

skills.languages: Python, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java (familiar), R (familiar)
skills.ml: Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, NumPy, Pandas, Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, LLMs, RAG, Model Evaluation, Cross-validation, SHAP, Explainable AI, Bayesian Inference, Prompt Engineering
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), MLOps, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, AWS, GCP, Git
